title: Kitbase
short_description: Privacy-first, client-side web utility platform with 20+ tools across PDF, image, dev, text, and more.
overview: Kitbase is a privacy-first, fully client-side web tools platform built with Next.js App Router and Tailwind CSS. It offers 20+ free utilities across 11 categories - PDF tools (merge, split, compress via Ghostscript WASM), image tools (resize, crop, compress, filters), developer tools (JSON formatter, Base64, Markdown viewer), text analysis, design tools (color, gradient, CSS), security tools (password generator, hash), cryptography (Caesar, Vigenère, Playfair ciphers), productivity timers, file metadata tools, calculators, and data visualization with chart and EDA workspaces. Files never leave the browser. The platform is also installable as a PWA with offline support via a service worker, and is open-source under AGPL-3.0.
contributions: Architected and built the entire platform from scratch using Next.js App Router with a category-based dynamic routing system
Implemented 20+ client-side tools across 11 categories: PDF, image, developer, text, design, security, cryptography, productivity, file, calculators, and visualization
Integrated Ghostscript compiled to WebAssembly for high-quality client-side PDF compression that preserves text and vector content
Built a PWA setup with service worker and web manifest for offline support and desktop/mobile installability
Implemented a global command palette search (⌘K) for fast tool discovery across the entire platform
Built an EDA Workspace tool supporting exploratory data analysis with descriptive statistics and advanced plot generation from CSV input
Designed a clean, minimal UI with a focus on zero-tracking, no-upload, and no-ad privacy principles
Licensed the project under AGPL-3.0 and set up proper source disclosure in the footer to comply with Ghostscript WASM licensing requirements
features: 20+ browser-based tools - no uploads, no server, no tracking
PDF tools: merge, split, compress (Ghostscript WASM)
Image tools: resize, crop, compress, filters
Developer tools: JSON formatter, Markdown viewer, Base64 encoder
Text tools: word counter, formatter, cleaner
Design tools: color picker, gradient builder, CSS utilities
Security tools: password generator, hash generator, token generator
Cryptography: Caesar, Vigenère, Playfair cipher demos
Productivity: Pomodoro timer, focus tools
Visualization: chart generator (Bar, Line, Area, Pie) and EDA Workspace from CSV
File tools: metadata extractor, checksum, hash
Calculators: unit, currency, percentage
Global command palette search (⌘K)
Installable PWA with offline support
Open-source under AGPL-3.0

title: RoverNote
short_description: Social travel journaling platform where users create and share scrapbook-style digital travel stories.
overview: RoverNote is a MERN-Stack social travel journaling platform where users transform their adventures into beautiful, scrapbook-style digital stories. The platform features a community feed of public travel journals, an interactive world map for pinning visited locations, a personal scrapbook builder with photos and handwritten-style notes, and a public/private journal toggle for sharing with friends or the wider community. Built on Next.js with a Supabase backend (PostgreSQL + Storage), Supabase Auth, and Paddle for subscription-based payments, RoverNote is a production-grade MERN-Stack application with a freemium model.
contributions: Designed and built the Full-Stack application from scratch using Next.js App Router and Supabase as the backend
Implemented Supabase Auth for user authentication and session management with secure role-based access to private and public journals
Built a scrapbook-style journal editor supporting photo uploads (Supabase Storage), handwritten-style captions, stickers, stamps, and layout customization
Developed an interactive world map feature allowing users to pin visited destinations and visualize their travel history geographically
Created a community feed for discovering and browsing public travel stories, filterable by destination
Integrated Paddle as the payment gateway for a freemium subscription model offering expanded storage and premium features
Built public/private journal visibility toggles and sharing controls for individual scrapbook entries
Designed the full UI with an editorial travel aesthetic using Tailwind CSS and Framer Motion animations
features: Scrapbook-style travel journal builder with photos, notes, stickers, and stamps
Interactive world map for pinning and tracking visited destinations
Community feed of public travel stories
Public/private journal visibility controls
Supabase Storage for photo uploads and media management
Supabase Auth for secure user authentication
Paddle payment gateway for freemium subscription model
Destination-based discovery with popular locations feed
Responsive design with editorial travel aesthetic
Free forever for personal use with premium upgrade path

title: Logic Gates Simulator
short_description: Comprehensive visual digital circuit designer with real-time simulation, sequential logic, and automated circuit analysis tools.
overview: Logic Gates Simulator is a feature-rich, visually interactive desktop application for designing, simulating, and analyzing digital circuits in real time. Built with Java 17 using LWJGL and Slick2D for rendering, and JNA for native system integration, the simulator supports a wide range of components - from basic logic gates and arithmetic circuits to sequential flip-flops and data processing units like encoders, decoders, multiplexers, and demultiplexers. Circuit analysis tools include automatic truth table generation, Boolean equation simplification, Karnaugh map reduction via the Quine-McCluskey algorithm, and real-time timing diagram visualization. Circuits can be saved and loaded using a custom binary file format (.lgsworld). Built as a Software Development II course project and designed for students, hobbyists, and professionals.
contributions: Designed and implemented the full simulator engine in Java 17 with real-time circuit evaluation and continuous signal propagation
Built a drag-and-drop visual circuit designer with zoom/pan navigation, wire connection management, and multi-gate selection

Implemented all 8 basic logic gates (AND, OR, NOT, NAND, NOR, XOR, XNOR, Buffer) and combinational components including half/full adders, subtractors, comparators, encoders, decoders, multiplexers, and demultiplexers
Added sequential logic support: D, JK, SR, and T flip-flops with a configurable clock generator running at 0.5s intervals

Built circuit analysis tools: automatic truth table generator, Boolean equation generator with simplification, real-time timing diagram viewer, and Karnaugh map simplifier using the Quine-McCluskey algorithm
Implemented a custom binary save/load file format (.lgsworld) with version control for persistent circuit storage
Added clipboard operations (Ctrl+C / Ctrl+V) with multi-gate selection supporting both Ctrl+click and box selection
Packaged the application as a cross-platform runnable JAR with Gradle build system, supporting Windows, Linux, and macOS
features: 8 basic logic gates: AND, OR, NOT, NAND, NOR, XOR, XNOR, Buffer
Arithmetic components: Half/Full Adders and Half/Full Subtractors
Data processing: 4-to-2 and 8-to-3 Encoders, 2-to-4 and 3-to-8 Decoders
Comparators: 1-bit and 2-bit with full A>B, A=B, A<B outputs
Multiplexers (2-to-1, 4-to-1) and Demultiplexers (1-to-2, 1-to-4)
Sequential logic: D, JK, SR, T flip-flops with clock generator
Truth table auto-generator for any circuit
Boolean equation generator with expression simplification
Real-time timing diagram visualization
Karnaugh map simplification via Quine-McCluskey algorithm
Custom binary save/load format (.lgsworld) with version control
Drag-and-drop visual design with zoom, pan, and wire routing
Multi-gate selection (Ctrl+click and box select) with clipboard copy/paste
Cross-platform: Windows, Linux, macOS
Packaged as runnable JAR via Gradle

title: Earnzy
short_description: Micro-task marketplace connecting buyers and workers with role-based dashboards and a coin reward system.
overview: Earnzy is a Full-Stack micro-task marketplace where buyers post tasks and workers complete them for coin-based rewards. The platform features three distinct role-based dashboards - Worker, Buyer, and Admin - with real-time updates, a coin economy for task payouts, Cloudinary-powered media uploads, and Firebase Authentication for secure access control. Built with a React frontend on Vite and an Express/MongoDB backend, Earnzy demonstrates end-to-end MERN-Stack architecture including REST API design, JWT-based auth with Firebase Admin SDK, and React Query for optimized data fetching.
contributions: Architected and built the MERN-Stack application with a React/Vite frontend and a Node.js/Express REST API backend connected to MongoDB Atlas
Implemented Firebase Authentication with role-based access control, routing protection, and Firebase Admin SDK token verification on the server
Built three fully distinct dashboards for Worker, Buyer, and Admin roles with role-specific views, actions, and real-time data updates
Designed and implemented a coin-based micro-economy where buyers fund tasks with coins and workers earn coins upon task approval
Integrated Cloudinary for media management, enabling buyers to upload proof assets and workers to submit task completion evidence
Used React Query for efficient server state management, caching, background refetching, and optimistic UI updates
Built a real-time notification system for task status changes, submission approvals, and coin transactions
Designed a glassmorphism-styled UI with Framer Motion animations and a fully mobile-first responsive layout
features: Role-based access: Worker, Buyer, and Admin dashboards
Firebase Authentication with protected routes per role
Coin-based micro-task reward and payment economy
Buyers can post tasks with coin bounties and approve/reject submissions
Workers can browse and submit tasks for coin rewards
Admin panel for platform oversight and user management
Cloudinary integration for media uploads and task proof assets
React Query for optimized, cached data fetching and real-time updates
Real-time notification system for task lifecycle events
Glassmorphism design with smooth Framer Motion animations
Mobile-first responsive layout

title: Dizmo
short_description: Premium Apple & tech products e-commerce platform for Bangladesh's leading gadget retailer.
overview: Dizmo is a full-featured e-commerce platform for one of Bangladesh's most trusted premium tech retailers, specializing in Apple products, smartphones, laptops, tablets, smartwatches, audio gear, and accessories. The storefront handles a wide product catalog across multiple categories with flash sales, offer pages, order tracking, and multi-location store support. Built to serve a large daily customer base with a mobile-first shopping experience.
contributions: Built the entire storefront UI from scratch including homepage, product listing, product detail, and category pages
Implemented multi-category navigation with dynamic routing for Phones, Laptops, Tablets, Watches, Audio, Accessories, Gadgets, and Cameras
Developed flash sale and offers pages with countdown timers and real-time product availability
Integrated SSLCommerz payment gateway and WhatsApp-based customer support chat widget
Built order tracking system allowing customers to track orders by invoice number
Implemented store locations page and responsive mobile-first layout optimized for Bangladeshi users
Created reusable component system for product cards, banners, category grids, and promotional sections
features: Multi-category product catalog with dynamic filtering
Flash sale section with countdown timer
Special offers and deals page
Order tracking by invoice number
Multiple store location finder
SSLCommerz payment integration
WhatsApp live chat support
Responsive mobile-first design
Product comparison feature
Newsletter subscription

title: Brand Empire
short_description: Premium fashion e-commerce destination with a curated clothing catalog for the Bangladeshi market.
overview: Brand Empire is a premium fashion e-commerce platform operating out of Jamuna Future Park, Dhaka. The site offers a curated catalog of men's and women's clothing - jackets, jeans, trousers, and more - with a focus on editorial aesthetics, seasonal collections, and a seamless shopping experience. Features include wishlist management, a shopping bag, user authentication, order tracking, a studio section, and mobile app download integration.
contributions: Designed and built the full storefront UI including homepage hero sliders, featured collections, and new arrivals sections
Implemented product listing with size selectors, color variants, discount badges, and add-to-cart functionality
Built wishlist and shopping bag features with persistent state management using Redux Toolkit
Developed multi-step user authentication flow with login, signup, and account/orders access
Created editorial-style homepage with full-screen banner carousels and curated collection sections
Integrated order tracking page and returns/exchange policy flows
Added mobile app download section with QR code and App Store / Google Play deep links
Implemented payment method display supporting Visa, Mastercard, Amex, and bKash
features: Editorial homepage with full-screen hero banners and seasonal campaigns
Product catalog with size, color variants, and discount badges
Wishlist and shopping bag with persistent state
User authentication and account dashboard
Order tracking system
Studio section for curated editorial content
Mobile app integration with QR code download
Multiple payment method support (Visa, Mastercard, bKash)
Blog section
Responsive mobile-first layout

title: Tarunya Prokashon
short_description: Bangla-language e-commerce platform for one of Bangladesh's trusted Islamic and general book publishers.
overview: তারুণ্য প্রকাশন (Tarunya Prokashon) is a fully Bangla-language online bookstore and publishing platform based in Dhaka, Bangladesh. The platform serves as the digital storefront for Tarunya Prokashon and partner publisher Sanchalon Prokashoni, offering books across 11 categories including novels, poetry, history, science, self-development, Islamic books, children's books, travel, and parenting. Features include author pages, publisher pages, book bundles, flash discounts up to 50% off, an upcoming books section, a blog, and SSLCommerz-integrated payments with bKash, Nagad, and cash-on-delivery support.
contributions: Built the entire storefront UI in Bangla language including homepage, category pages, product detail pages, and author/publisher profile pages
Implemented 11-category book navigation with dynamic routing and Bengali slugs
Developed promotional sections including weekly featured book, new arrivals, bestsellers, and Boi Mela (book fair) bestsellers
Built author and publisher directory pages with dedicated book listing views
Created book bundle/package section showcasing combo deals with savings calculations
Integrated SSLCommerz payment gateway supporting bKash, Nagad, and cash on delivery
Implemented order tracking system with invoice-based lookup
Developed blog section and FAQ accordion for customer support
Built newsletter subscription and Messenger/WhatsApp floating chat support widgets
Ensured full Bangla Unicode text rendering and RTL-compatible typography across all pages
